stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The annex shows a multifunctional display. VOR 1 is displayed, which has been tuned to a nearby VOR station and correctly identified . The aircraft is...

options.a: 6° left of the selected course on radial 310 outbound.
options.b: 6° left of the selected course on radial 130 inbound.
options.c: 3° left of the selected course on radial 130 inbound.
options.d: 3° right of the selected course on radial 310 outbound .
